reviews.comment:
Esta YPF fue el único lugar donde pude desayunar un día de semana, estando de pasada por La Paz! Preguntando por todos lados, me mandaban de hotel a hotel y barrios, los hoteles no te quieren atender porque no estás hospedado (es un café con leche man!!!!!) No una cirugía de próstata!!!!, así que después de deambular terminé acá, atendido de 10 y desayunando unas ricas medialunas, super recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF was the only place I could find for breakfast on a weekday while passing through La Paz! Asking around everywhere, they sent me from hotel to hotel and neighborhood to neighborhood. The hotels didn't want to serve me because I wasn't a guest (it's just a coffee with milk, man!!!!!). Not prostate surgery!!!! So after wandering around, I ended up here, with excellent service and delicious croissants for breakfast. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17509192282754172600/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHN2M3SUJBEAE
